title: 2024年度 第2回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「誰が作った？」に3の「私が（作った）」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「辛い」→誰の答えでない。2「20ドル」→値段。3「私が」→正解。

questions.question: What is the best response?
choices: Sorry, we only have orange juice.
questions.explanation: 「リンゴジュースある？」に1の「すみません、オレンジジュースだけ」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「オレンジだけ」→正解。2「1つ食べた」→無関係。3「来てくれてありがとう」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hurry up, please. We have to go.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「急いで、行かないと」に2の「今行く」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1時間」→無関係。2「今行く」→正解。3「あちら」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What time did you get up today?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ベッドの上」→無関係。2「時間がなかった」→無関係。3「早いね」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When will your brother finish high school?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What will he do after that?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「その後どうする？」に2の「大学に行く」が適切。
highlights: What will he do after that
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「英語のテスト」→無関係。2「大学に行く」→正解。3「姉妹も」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Let's go to the beach together.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「なぜ？」に2の「ピアノのレッスンがある」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「泳ぐの好き」→行けない理由でない。2「ピアノのレッスン」→正解。3「友達と」→理由でない。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「お店がすぐ閉まる」に1の「急がないと」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「急がないと」→正解。2「あとでやる」→急ぐ場面。3「日曜日に」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Does this bus go to the train station?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「どのくらいかかる？」に2の「約20分」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「5ドル」→時間を聞いている。2「約20分」→正解。3「乗れる」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Excuse me. Is this your phone?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「ベンチの上にあった」→3の「ありがとう」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「番号じゃない」→電話を見つけた。2「公園の近く」→無関係。3「ありがとう」→正解。

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「手伝える」に1の「ありがとう、優しいね」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ありがとう」→正解。2「彼女を見た」→無関係。3「もうやった」→難しいと言っている。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How was the concert last night?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My favorite band played, but I didn't like it.

questions.question: Where did the boy go last night?
questions.explanation: 「昨夜のコンサートどうだった」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ギターレッスン」→コンサート。2「CDショップ」→コンサート。3「女の子の家」→コンサート。4「コンサート」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's in the living room, Katie.

questions.question: Where is the book?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「床の上」→ソファ。2「ソファの上」→正解。3「ケイティの部屋」→リビング。4「寝室」→リビング。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I really like Mr. Gordon's English class.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Me, too. He's a good teacher.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yeah. I like writing stories, too.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.explanation: 「ゴードン先生の英語の授業」について話している。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「新番組」→授業。2「新しい本屋」→授業。3「英語の授業」→正解。4「好きな本」→授業。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Can we go to the zoo today, Mom?

questions.question: Why won't they go to the zoo today?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「雨」→正解。2「閉まっている」→雨。3「高すぎる」→博物館の理由。4「遠い」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you want some more spaghetti, Julie?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: No, thanks. I want to eat dessert.

questions.question: Why doesn't Julie want more spaghetti?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「デザートが食べたい」→正解。2「スパゲティが嫌い」→デザート。3「のどが渇いた」→言及なし。4「冷たい」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Excuse me. Do you work here?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I bought this lamp here, but it's broken.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK. I'll give you a new one.

questions.question: What is the woman's problem?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「仕事が必要」→ランプ。2「助けられない」→助ける。3「ランプが壊れた」→正解。4「財布をなくした」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Does your father work at the hospital?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes, but he isn't a doctor.

questions.question: What is the girl's father's job?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「料理人」→正解。2「医者」→否定。3「看護師」→否定。4「教師」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Let's go to the movies sometime.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I can't. How about Saturday afternoon?

questions.question: When will they go to the movies?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「今夜」→土曜。2「明日の午後」→土曜。3「明日の夜」→断られた。4「土曜の午後」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you enjoy the art contest, Sally?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. I liked Sam's painting, Tom.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I liked Mindy's painting and Bob's painting.

questions.question: Whose painting did Sally like?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ミンディの」→トムが好き。2「ボブの」→トムが好き。3「サムの」→正解。4「トムの」→男の子の名前。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Why were you late today, Pete?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sorry, Ms. Baker. I slept too long.

questions.question: Why was Pete late?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「寝すぎた」→正解。2「宿題忘れた」→寝すぎ。3「自転車壊れた」→言及なし。4「電車が遅れた」→言及なし。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Andy went to a concert with two friends. The concert was four hours long. Andy was tired, but he had fun.

questions.question: How long was the concert?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1時間」→4時間。2「2時間」→友達の数。3「3時間」→4時間。4「4時間」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Megan is busy because she'll go on a trip tomorrow. Today, she has to go shopping after work and clean her house tonight.

questions.question: What will Megan do tomorrow?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「買い物」→今日。2「旅行」→正解。3「家を掃除」→今夜。4「仕事」→今日。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My family has a pet dog. My mom and I play with him a lot, and my dad gives him food every day.

questions.question: Who gives food to the dog every day?
questions.explanation: 「お父さんが毎日ご飯をあげる」。
highlights: my dad gives him food every day
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「男の子」→遊ぶ。2「姉妹」→言及なし。3「母」→遊ぶ。4「父」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Laura usually makes her lunch and eats it at a park near her office. But yesterday was her friend's birthday, so they ate at a restaurant.

questions.question: Where does Laura usually eat lunch?
questions.explanation: 「普段はオフィス近くの公園で食べる」。
highlights: eats it at a park near her office
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「友達の家」→言及なし。2「レストラン」→昨日だけ。3「オフィス」→公園。4「公園」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Julie went shopping. She saw a nice red shirt, but it was too small. The store also had blue and white shirts. Julie bought a white one.

questions.question: Which shirt was too small?
highlights: a nice red shirt, but it was too small
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「青」→小さくない。2「黒」→言及なし。3「白」→買った。4「赤」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yesterday was Ray's birthday. His mother gave him a sweater, and his father gave him a bike. He got a comic book from Helen.

questions.question: What did Helen give to Ray?
questions.explanation: 「ヘレンから漫画をもらった」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「セーター」→母。2「自転車」→父。3「漫画」→正解。4「カード」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Every morning, I get up at 6:00. I get dressed, and then I eat breakfast at 6:30. I leave for school at 7:15, and I get there at 7:30.

questions.question: What time does the boy eat breakfast?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: On Monday afternoon, Mr. Tanaka's students will study English. They will have an art class on Wednesday afternoon, and on Friday afternoon, they will take a test.

questions.question: When will the students have an art class?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「月曜」→英語。2「水曜」→正解。3「木曜」→言及なし。4「金曜」→テスト。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Ian didn't go to school today. His mother had a baby last night, so he went to the hospital with his father today.

questions.question: Where did Ian go today?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「病院」→正解。2「学校」→行かなかった。3「父のオフィス」→病院。4「公園」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Marsha usually plays tennis on Saturdays. This weekend, it will rain, so Marsha will play video games at home with her brother.

questions.question: What will Marsha do this weekend?
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「テレビゲーム」→正解。2「兄弟と走る」→ゲーム。3「友達の家」→家で。4「テニス観戦」→普段はテニス。
